name: Picker
description: Pickers help operators choose dates and times — a trip window, a report period, a maintenance due date. They pair a typeable field with a calendar or clock surface, and support ranges for from–to selections.
keyRule: Offer both: let operators type a date in the field and pick from the calendar. Use a range picker for any from–to selection (reports, trip history), and always respect the user's locale and time zone.

variants.name: Date picker
variants.whenToUse: A single date (due date, start date).

variants.name: Date range picker
variants.whenToUse: A from–to span (report period, trip history).

variants.name: Date-time / date-time range
variants.whenToUse: When both date and time matter (precise trip windows).

variants.name: Field-only
variants.whenToUse: Keyboard entry without a popup (power users).

variants.name: Static / inline
variants.whenToUse: Always-open calendar embedded in a panel.

anatomy.name: Input field
anatomy.description: typeable date/time with a calendar/clock trigger.

anatomy.name: Header
anatomy.description: the current selection summary on the surface.

anatomy.name: Range highlight
anatomy.description: the span between start and end on a range picker.

behaviors.name: Type or pick
behaviors.description: The field accepts typed input in the locale format; the calendar/clock offers visual selection. Both stay in sync.

behaviors.name: Ranges
behaviors.description: Selecting a start then an end highlights the span; presets ("Last 7 days", "This month") speed up common choices.

behaviors.name: Constraints
behaviors.description: Min/max and disabled dates prevent invalid choices (e.g. no future service date in the past); validation shows in the field's supporting text.

behaviors.name: Locale & time zone
behaviors.description: Formats, first-day-of-week, and time zone follow the operator's settings — important for a global fleet.

specs.value: primary background — use dark text or primary-dark; white on #F47735 fails AA

props.name: mode
props.description: Which picker shape to render — Date picker, Time picker, or Date range picker per the spec's Variants table. Date-time is composed by pairing a date-mode Picker with a time-mode Picker rather than a fourth mode.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value: a single Date for date/time mode, or a [start, end] tuple for dateRange mode.

props.name: onChange
props.type: (value: Date | [Date | null, Date | null] | null) => void
props.description: Called when the operator types or picks a new value; both input paths stay in sync per the 'Type or pick' behavior.

props.name: variant
props.description: Popup (typeable field + calendar/clock trigger, default), Field-only (keyboard entry without a popup, for power users), or Static/inline (always-open calendar embedded in a panel).

props.name: minDate
props.description: Earliest selectable date/time; part of the Constraints behavior that disables invalid choices rather than erroring after.

props.name: disabledDates
props.description: Individually disabled dates, e.g. to block a future service date in the past.

props.name: presets
props.description: Quick presets for a date range, e.g. "Last 7 days", "This month", to speed up common choices.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the popup calendar/clock surface is open (popup variant only).

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the popup surface should open or close.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base picker/tf classes.

doThis: Disable invalid dates rather than erroring after.
dontDoThis: Don't force calendar-only entry for power users.
Don't ignore time zones on a global fleet.
Don't use white text on the orange header.
accessibility: The field is labelled and announces the selected value.
The calendar is keyboard navigable (arrows move days, Page changes months) with aria grid semantics.
Selected and disabled days are conveyed to assistive tech, not by colour alone.

related.name: TextField
related.why: Typed entry for known exact dates/times

related.name: Dialog
related.why: The modal surface pickers open inside
